name: ATI Inc.
description: ATI Inc. is a global producer of high-performance materials and solutions, specializing in specialty alloys and components. The company's primary products include titanium and titanium alloys, nickel-based alloys and superalloys, and specialty steels. ATI serves diverse and demanding markets, including aerospace and defense, oil and gas, chemical processing, and electrical energy. With advanced manufacturing capabilities, ATI delivers critical materials designed to withstand extreme temperatures, corrosion, and stress.
